name: Control Plane
commonFailureModes: HTTP request and response shapes belong in packages/api-contract before implementation changes.
Auth/JWKS behavior should use packages/providers rather than local duplicate failure taxonomies.
Routing changes can alter Mobile and Agent Runtime assumptions even when only Control Plane code moves.
Provider transport outages should stay distinguishable from malformed token failures.
reviewHints: API contract changes should inspect Mobile callers and Agent Runtime internal API consumers.
Provider/auth changes should inspect HTTP status mapping and retry semantics.
